title: Newly Declassified Pentagon UFO Records Reveal Videos, Pilot Reports and Unexplained Sightings
description: Among the newly public materials are accounts of glowing "green orbs," "fireballs," cigar-shaped objects, and unexplained formations seen near military installations, over oceans, and during flight operations.

title: New UFO videos solicit baffled explanations ranging from angels and demons to jetpacks and balloons
description: Comments flooded social media comparing the wacky videos to angels and demons after they were released Friday, and some online posters claimed they were winged creatures and fiery wheels that appeared in the likes of the Book of Ezekiel.

title: UFO researcher who died in police custody after chilling final posts was linked to dead anti-gravity scientist
description: A troubled aerospace researcher who claimed he was being experimented on has been connected to the growing list of missing and dead scientists with links to government secrets.

title: When will the next UFO files be released?
